steps.title: Locate Oak Tree House's benefit
steps.content: The student wants an advantage of Oak Tree House, not Yucca House. The relevant note says Oak Tree House was built under a rock overhang and that the ledges protected it from heavy rain and snow.

steps.title: Avoid unrelated facts
steps.content: Choice A says an advantage existed but does not explain it. Choice B gives location and dates. Choice C uses the flat-terrain advantage associated with Yucca House, not Oak Tree House. The sentence naming the overhang's protection fits the goal. The answer is D.
